name: @kolmogorov/distill-worker
description: Isolated kolm distillation worker. Heavy ML deps (torch/transformers/onnxruntime) live HERE, not in the root package — root kolm install stays light, regulated tenants opt in to the worker when (and only when) they have the toolchain.

python.note: Install in a separate Python venv. The Node entrypoint detects whether `python3` + `torch` are importable and only invokes scripts/train_lora.py when both succeed; otherwise it stops at the training-pair-collection step with an honest manifest.
